_purpose: Map quality inventory scripts to non-headline fields a consuming quality artifact should engage with. Used by scripts/validate_inventory_consumption.py to close the consumer-side of issue #145: helpers expose review-state, but agents were collapsing them into headline-only summaries. Opt-in per inventory — only scripts listed here are enforced.
_contract: For each inventory in ## Commands Run, the artifact body must literally contain at least one of `non_headline_fields`. Add new entries when a new inventory exposes review-state beyond status/heuristics. Remove entries only when the inventory is deleted.
